title: Prove keystone: subscription auth works inside Docker ($0)
description: Spike: minimal image, mounted file-based creds, NO API key in env. claude -p and codex exec both answered -> subscription-backed, zero API cost. De-risks the whole premise.

title: Write implementation plan (then materialize future tasks as beads issues)
description: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-prism-mvp.md with bite-sized TDD tasks; create the future build issues as a bd dependency graph.

title: Digest Cloudflare article into lessons doc + ADR 0007-0009
description: docs/reference/cloudflare-lessons.md (what-NOT-to-flag, stdin-not-argv, shared-context frugality, one-shot done-detection, truncation retry, heartbeat). ADR-0007 runtime divergence from OpenCode, ADR-0008 orchestration as pluggable seam, ADR-0009 markdown agent prompts.

title: Forced lint hook + CI pipeline (ruff/mypy/pytest/semgrep)
description: .githooks/ chains beads + ruff gate (proven to block violations). .github/workflows/ci.yml runs ruff, mypy, pytest, semgrep on push/PR.

title: Record ADRs 0001-0006 (critical decisions)
description: docs/adr/: 0001 CLI-first runtime, 0002 Docker cred-mount auth, 0003 Python+uv, 0004 GitHub-first via gh, 0005 beads tracking, 0006 reasoning-effort knob.

title: Brainstorm + write MVP design spec
description: Collaborative brainstorm; locked decisions (CLI-first subs, Docker, Python+uv, GitHub-first, beads, effort knob). Spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-prism-mvp-design.md.

title: Prism MVP: subscription-CLI AI code review, GitHub-first, Docker-native
description: Build the MVP per the design spec: local-mode review driving claude/codex subscription CLIs at $0, coordinator + code_quality + security reviewers + judge pass, structured findings, markdown report, optional GitHub PR post. Tracks all Prism work.
